title: Expand interop-status needs and fix failure reporting logic
description: Update interop-status job to depend on ALL interop jobs including frame-parser-interop, multinode-simulator, wire-format-python-to-rust. Fix the jq check and if-condition so that any failure in dependent jobs causes the workflow to fail clearly. Handle cases where bd or tooling is missing.
close_reason: Updated interop-status to depend on all jobs (frame-parser-interop, multinode-simulator, vector-compatibility, wire-format-python-to-rust, announce-interop), switched to always() with least-privilege permissions, installed jq for tooling, improved reporting logic and jq check for clear failure on any non-success. YAML valid, jq predicate tested. Local commit done; push blocked by divergence on .beads files.
